rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.012, which governs agency compliance with the comptroller's contract management guide for contracts with regional education service centers.
quote: The agency shall comply with the comptroller's contract management guide developed under Section 2262.051, Government Code, in each contract between the agency and a regional education service center established under this chapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text; rule concerns contract management, not property tax exemptions.
